name: Murder on the Express
description:
TRAIN MURDER MYSTERY

Eleven passengers on the night train to Vienna, unbeknownst to the fact that murderers lurk among them

𖤝

The year is 1930. A luxurious train under the Orient Express is travelling through the remote and snowy Alps towards it's destination, the city of Vienna. The journey takes place during the night and arrival is expected the next morning.

The train houses many luxurious amenities. Private cabins, bars, lounges, all for the passengers to enjoy at their own leisure. Your complete comfort is the main priority here!

On this particular ride however, something far more sinister is brewing. There are no staff onboard and the train conductor is mysteriously missing, leaving the eleven passengers all by themselves to deal with the coming storm.

Stay vigilant and aware, flush out the ones who seek to paint the train in yours and everyone else's blood and you may just live to see the morning.

Or choose to be the one to wield the knife yourself...

𖤝

𖤝

🔲PREMADE SCENARIO INSTRUCTIONS🔲

Each scenario has its own starting message.
This bot includes 6 premade mystery scenarios you can choose from when starting a new chat. By choosing a specific intro, the correct scenario is activated automatically and the AI will stay consistent in the story logic.

You can identify which scenario it is at the very top of the initial message.

Each scenario contains:

  • Who the murderer(s) is

  • How they will attempt the murders

  • Their motive

Just pick the intro you like and start roleplaying. The initial messages themselves will be identical, but the scenarios in each of them won't be.

Intro message 1-5: One or more of the other passengers is the murderer

Intro message 6: You are the murderer (if you want to roleplay that perspective)

Intro message 7: No predetermined scenario (if you want to come up with something completely di
